payload.author: claude
payload.body: All 15 review findings fixed in one pass. Verified: npm test 90/90 green (added exact-key, non-ASCII, limit-clamp + array-limit cases); iOS sim build 0 errors/0 warnings; live CLI search smoke (exact 'SCP-96' leads, comment/description search OK). Shared TicketBadges view + merged priority CSS removed the badge duplication. Two out-of-scope items (graph loadRelationEdges Sendable, test watcher leak) left for separate tickets.
